Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Arbitration And Stay Arbitration Including All Discovery Matters
Off Calendar Feb-26-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT JOIE DE VIVRE ORCHARD, LLC's Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings Including All Discovery Matters - Motion to compel arbitration is granted. The terms of the binding arbitration agreement are clear. The agreement is not procedurally unconscionable. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976
